title: Shipping Operation Support Executive (5 days + AWS + VB)
description:
Duties & Responsibilities

  1. Conduct reviews and assessments of transactions, product-shifting applications, and any associated impacts.
  2. Classify products in accordance with export control policies, including strategic and non‑strategic categories.
  3. Collaborate with HQ to ensure policy updates and equipment movement details are accurately maintained in the company’s database.
  4. Ensure that Trade Control operations comply with local government regulations and the company’s global control policies.
  5. Manage and maintain proper documentation and recordkeeping for all Trade Control activities and related operations.
  6. Perform end‑user screening for company products prior to shipment or quotation.
  7. Provide training support to promote compliance awareness related to export and customs regulations within the Group.
  8. Undertake any other ad‑hoc duties as assigned.

Skills and Competencies

  • Prior experience in Product Classification, Customs Regulations, or the Singapore Strategic Goods Control Act is preferred.
  • Diploma or Degree in a relevant field.
  • Strong team player with excellent interpersonal skills.


Interested candidates who wish to apply for the above positions, please click "Apply now" 

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. 

JAC Recruitment Pte. Ltd. 

EA License No: 90C3026

EA Personnel Name: Wong Yi Lei

postedCompany.description:
JAC is an international recruitment consultancy with over 45 years of specialised recruitment experience across Asia and Europe. We have over 1,200 expert consultants who have a deep cultural understanding of the local markets they operate in. Combined with our regional network and specialised industry focus we are renowned for placing highly skilled permanent and contracting staff into specialist positions.

In Singapore, we cover the Banking and Financial Services, Corporate Services, Digital and Information Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Industrial, Sales & Marketing sectors. We also recruit for contract roles and have a dedicated team that can assist with hiring for Japanese-language skills.

Our job board is updated daily so you can stay updated on jobs as they become available and find the next best role for you.
